# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / code quality
- [ ] Scientific methodology change
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Reproducibility checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] Random seeds are preserved
- [ ] New dependencies are declared in both `requirements.txt` and `pyproject.toml`
- [ ] `CITATION.cff` / `.zenodo.json` updated if author list changed

## Scientific checklist

- [ ] Numerical results in the paper remain reproducible
- [ ] New methodology is described in `docs/METHODOLOGY.md`
- [ ] New figures saved to `reports/figures/`

## Additional notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know. -->
